section_name: Defense to Prosecution: Bond in Effect
chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) It is a defense to prosecution under Section 623.165 (Penalty) that the person charged produces a surety bond that complies with Section 623.163 (Surety Bond) that was valid at the time the offense is alleged to have occurred.

(b) If the court verifies the bond produced by the person, the court shall dismiss the charge.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.166 — Defense to Prosecution: Bond in Effect

(a) It is a defense to prosecution under Section 623.165 (Penalty) that the person charged produces a surety bond that complies with Section 623.163 (Surety Bond) that was valid at the time the offense is alleged to have occurred.

(b) If the court verifies the bond produced by the person, the court shall dismiss the charge.

*Added by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 942, Sec. 10, eff. Sept. 1, 2001.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: If the court verifies the bond produced by the person, the court shall dismiss the charge.
